title: LSC 24” Broom Indoor Outdoor Soft Broom Sweeping Brush with Wooden Handle Natural Coco Bristles Indoor Floor Brush with Dense Soft Bristles Brooms for Room (PACK OF 1)
features: Soft Bristles: Strong Soft bristles help you swipe more surface area at once, giving your dust cleaning broom the power to clean better with every glide and tiring you less, while gliding with extreme ease on almost all surfaces (including ceramics, wooden floor, linoleum, marble, etc). The Soft bristles broom can be used both for outdoor sweeping as well as indoor sweeping.

Multi-Purpose Broom: The Cleaning Stiff Bristles Broom is a versatile outdoor yard brush designed for various cleaning tasks. With a wooden head and stiff natural bassine bristles, it serves as an ideal hard brush for effectively tackling dirt and debris in gardens, on decking, driveways, yards, and patios. The wooden construction of the head ensures durability, while the stiff bristles made of natural bassine provide the necessary toughness for thorough cleaning.

Indoor Broom: The broom is effective in sweeping away dust, dirt, and smaller debris commonly found indoors. It's designed to capture and hold onto particles, leaving the indoor space clean. Whether it's an office, a room in a house, or a garage, the broom is versatile enough to handle different indoor environments. The size and design make it easy to maneuver around furniture and other obstacles.

Wooden Broom: The long wooden broom handle is lightweight yet strong enough to support you on daily sweeping tasks. Reduce the pain in the knees and back while doing housework. Outside broom head and the handle are in strong connection, which is not easy to loosen. The head of our broomstick takes a special process, to make it more durable and better than an ordinary broom.

Widely Used: Our indoor and outdoor broom can be used on most floor surfaces including wood, linoleum, tile, concrete and cement. Ideal for home, kitchen and outdoor rough surface, patios, sidewalks, driveways and industrial spaces, shops, garages, porch and warehouse. This comes as unassembled broom head and handle. You can easily assemble it by pushing handle into the plastic socket on the broom head.

Versatile Design Built to withstand both indoor and outdoor conditions, making it suitable for various cleaning environments. This broom is perfect for sweeping floors, tile, laminate, vinyl, patio, garage, and more. Soft Bristles The broom features ultra-soft bristles that effectively capture dust and particles without causing any damage to your floors or delicate surfaces. Reinforced bristle attachment to prevent shedding or loosening, ensuring the broom remains intact during use. Reduce The Pain The 24-inch size of this broom allows for efficient sweeping and covers a wider area, reducing your cleaning time. Designed with an ergonomic handle for a comfortable grip and enhanced control while sweeping. They effectively catch and hold onto dirt, dust, and even small particles, ensuring a thorough and efficient clean.
